translations: And say Do then Allah will see then Allah will see
your deed and His Messenger and the believers And you will be brought back
to (the) Knower (of) the unseen and the seen
then He will inform you of what you used (to) do
puzzle.hint: This verse motivates believers to engage in good deeds, reminding them that their actions are witnessed by Allah, His Prophet, and the faithful community.
puzzle.arabic: وَقُلِ ٱعْمَلُوا۟ فَسَيَرَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَلَكُمْ وَرَسُولُهُۥ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۖ وَسَتُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰ عَـٰلِمِ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
puzzle.verseEn: And say, "Do [as you will], for Allāh will see your deeds, and [so will] His Messenger and the believers. And you will be returned to the Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, and He will inform you of what you used to do."
